title: The River Mouth Dissolution

features.name: mouth-widening
features.desc-on-touch: The river spreads impossibly, losing definition with each meter. It cannot remember what it was as a current.

features.name: salt-intrusion-line
features.desc-on-touch: Fresh and salt water maintain a visible boundary briefly before it diffuses into ambiguity.

features.name: name-dissolution-pool
features.desc-on-touch: Here the river's name becomes indistinguishable from the sea's. Speech dissolves into salt.

features.name: memory-erasure-field
features.desc-on-touch: Tidal mixing erases whatever the river remembered. Each tide writes over the previous identity.

features.name: final-broadcast-marker
features.desc-on-touch: A channel marker where the river's last coherent signal occurs before becoming ocean noise.

inscription: the river forgets itself gradually, then all at once. this is the moment between. salt water keeps its grudges longer.

file.name: River_Name_Last_Recording.mp3
file.note: The moment the river stops broadcasting its current-identity, approximately 47 seconds. After this point, only ocean noise and slowly dissolving memory.

exits.label: back upriver to the estuary's extended monologue
toward the open sea where all names dissolve completely
back upriver where identity is still maintained
